name: Marcus T.
text: Finally someone breaking down the actual study data instead of hype. I've been taking ashwagandha for 3 months and the cortisol reduction is real for me, but I appreciate knowing the effect sizes are modest in most trials.

name: Jennifer K.
text: Question: did any of the studies you reviewed test different dosages? I'm on 300mg daily but wondering if I should go higher based on what actually works.

name: David R.
text: Tried it for 2 weeks, felt nothing. Switched to meditation and that's been way more effective. Individual response must vary a lot based on your baseline stress levels.

name: Priya M.
text: The mechanism section was really helpful. Knowing it works on GABA receptors explains why it pairs well with my yoga routine. Nice to see the science matched my experience.

name: Kevin L.
text: Appreciate the honesty about the placebo effect being high in stress studies. That said, if it works it works - my sleep improved either way so I'm keeping it in my stack.
